title: Device Management
name: Device Name
createLocalDeviceHelp: Used to tell backend whether to create local device record only.
deviceIdHelp: Optional. If provided, only a local device is created and cloud provisioning is skipped.
marketHelp: Written by server-side DEFAULT_MARKET automatically and not editable during device creation.
metadataHelp: Optional. Must be a JSON object.
certificateEntryHelp: Device access credentials are shown in a dedicated panel. Click "View Access Credential" to inspect.
certificateHelp: Copying or downloading claims the full access credential once. Regular claim entry is blocked afterward, while encrypted storage is retained on the backend.
deviceCredentialHelp: Copying or downloading claims the full device credential once. Regular claim entry is blocked afterward, while encrypted storage is retained on the backend.
certificateClaimedHelp: This access credential has already been claimed once. Rotate the credential and wait for the new set to be issued before claiming again.
deviceCredentialClaimedHelp: This device credential has already been claimed once. Reissue or rotate the device credential and wait for the new secret to be written back before claiming again.
certificateRotationPendingHelp: Access credential rotation has been requested. Wait for the new credential set to be issued and written back before copying or downloading again.
deviceCredentialRotationPendingHelp: Device credential rotation has been requested. Wait for the new secret to be written back before copying or downloading again.
certificateUnavailable: No access credential is currently available for this device
deviceCredentialUnavailable: No device credential is currently available for this device
rotateDeviceCredentialConfirm: This will request a device credential reissue or rotation for this device. An audit log will be recorded. Please check the status later for completion.
rotateCertificateConfirm: This will request an access credential reissue or rotation for this device. An audit log will be recorded. Please check the status later for completion.
certificateUnavailableWithRotate: No access credential is available yet. You can request credential rotation directly.
deviceCredentialUnavailableWithRotate: No device credential is available yet. You can request a reissue or rotation directly.
commandPayloadHelp: Provide a JSON object. The platform will wrap and attach commandId automatically.
